queue.title: Auto-slim gate for SESSION_*.md files
queue.description: (added ~s1872): The token-budget-estimator already detects over-budget files and auto-creates wq items. Add a pre-commit hook check that warns (non-blocking) when any SESSION_*.md edit pushes a file over the 3000-token threshold, catching bloat at commit time rather than waiting for the next audit cycle.

queue.title: Add E session engagement-depth tracking to audit-stats
queue.description: (from brainstorming ~s1857): Audit currently only tracks E session cost trend (last-5 avg). Should also track engagement depth: threads-per-session and platforms-per-session as separate metrics in audit-stats.mjs output. Adds e_engagement_trend with {avg_threads, avg_platforms, min_threads, floor_violations}. Would catch engagement thinning earlier — the 3→2→1 thread decline took 5 sessions to flag.

outcome.note: Added computeEEngagementTrend() to audit-stats.mjs. Tracks avg_threads, avg_platforms, min_threads, floor_violations, trend direction from engagement-trace data. Includes session dedup for current+archive overlap. Outputs e_engagement_trend in audit-stats JSON.

queue.title: Revise R scope budget metric to exclude directive-plan files
queue.description: (from audit A#215): R scope budget has been stale at 20% compliance for 3 consecutive audits. All violations driven by BRIEFING.md and HOOK_CONSOLIDATION_PLAN.md updates as structural side-effects of d074/d075 directive work. Evaluate adding a 'directive_plan_files' exclusion list to r_scope_budget in audit-stats.mjs so that plan-tracking files touched during active directive work don't count as non-routine. Risk: could mask genuine scope creep. Mitigation: only exclude files explicitly listed in active directive metadata.

queue.title: Add credential-diversity check to E session posthook quality audit
queue.description: (from audit A#215): '1800+ sessions' credential phrase appears in 4/12 recent E session traces (33%), 2/5 in last 5 (40%). Pattern: 'operational data/pattern from 1800+ sessions of [X]'. Add a check to e-posthook-quality-audit.mjs that flags when the engagement trace summary contains session-count credentials (regex: /\d{3,}\+? sessions/), appending a quality note encouraging credential diversity. Not blocking — advisory only.
